subject: SAML login failures after IdP certificate rotation
summary: Northwind users could not log in with SAML after the customer uploaded a new IdP signing certificate but did not update the metadata URL in AcmeDesk.
cause: IdP certificate thumbprint mismatch between Okta metadata and AcmeDesk SSO configuration.
resolution: Validated metadata, refreshed SAML certificate cache, and asked the customer to upload the new metadata XML.

subject: Intermittent Azure AD SSO failures for EU admins
summary: Umbrella Health admins saw intermittent SSO failures from one region only.
cause: Azure AD conditional access policy blocked AcmeDesk relay state for a subset of users.
resolution: Customer updated conditional access policy and confirmed successful login.
